name: Hanging Novelty Wooden Small Bird House Feeding Station Nest Nesting Box
description: Description:This wooden birdhouse offers your bird friends a cozy home.A one way hole to let you see the birds inside.It features a rope for hanging.This unique design birdhouse is the perfect addition to any home or garden of your choice.Delightful garden accessory for adding color and interest to your patio area.Specification:Material: Wood Color: As Pictures ShownSize: Approx. 15x 16x 17.5cm/ 5.91x 6.30x 6.89inchPackage Includes:1 Piece Wooden BirdhouseNote:The color may have different as the difference display, pls understand.Please allow 1-3mm error due to hand test.
